Bash(python3.13 - <<'EOF'
import re

path = r"C:\\Users\\Business\\ibrahim-portfolio\\untitledui-nextjs-starter-kit\\src\\styles\\portfolio.css"
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    css = f.read\(\)

def replace_in_font_body_blocks\(css\):
    result = []
    i = 0
    while i < len\(css\):
        brace_open = css.find\('{', i\)
        if brace_open == -1:
            result.append\(css[i:]\)
            break
        result.append\(css[i:brace_open+1]\)
        i = brace_open + 1
        depth = 1
        j = i
        while j < len\(css\) and depth > 0:
            if css[j] == '{': depth += 1
            elif css[j] == '}': depth -= 1
            j += 1
        block = css[i:j]
        if 'var\(--font-body\)' in block:
            block = block.replace\('var\(--text-muted\)', 'var\(--text-body\)'\)
        result.append\(block\)
        i = j
    return ''.join\(result\)

new_css = replace_in_font_body_blocks\(css\)

with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_css\)

changed = css.count\('var\(--text-muted\)'\) - new_css.count\('var\(--text-muted\)'\)
print\(f"Replaced in {changed} rule\(s\)"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3.13 - <<'EOF'
import re

path = r"C:\\Users\\Business\\ibrahim-portfolio\\untitledui-nextjs-starter-kit\\src\\styles\\portfolio.css"
with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    css = f.read\(\)

def update_line_height_in_font_body_blocks\(css\):
    result = []
    i = 0
    while i < len\(css\):
        brace_open = css.find\('{', i\)
        if brace_open == -1:
            result.append\(css[i:]\)
            break
        result.append\(css[i:brace_open+1]\)
        i = brace_open + 1
        depth = 1
        j = i
        while j < len\(css\) and depth > 0:
            if css[j] == '{': depth += 1
            elif css[j] == '}': depth -= 1
            j += 1
        block = css[i:j]
        if 'var\(--font-body\)' in block:
            block = re.sub\(r'line-height:\\s*[\\d.]+', 'line-height: 1.75', block\)
        result.append\(block\)
        i = j
    return ''.join\(result\)

new_css = update_line_height_in_font_body_blocks\(css\)

with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    f.write\(new_css\)

original_values = re.findall\(r'line-height:\\s*\([\\d.]+\)', css\)
new_values = re.findall\(r'line-height:\\s*\([\\d.]+\)', new_css\)
changed = sum\(1 for a, b in zip\(original_values, new_values\) if a != b\)
print\(f"Updated line-height in {changed} font-body rule\(s\)"\)
EOF)
